name: Patient Case
history: Brother died by suicide when the patient was young. Ongoing family conflict about discussing the loss. Parents initially did not allow the patient to seek talk therapy after the death.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I express my feelings, I will be rejected or misunderstood.
intermediate_belief_depression: There is no point in trying to change things because it won't help.
coping_strategies: Avoid discussing emotions and the past to prevent conflict and rejection.
situation: Noticing that the brother's birthday is approaching.
auto_thought: I can't handle these emotions, and no one will understand.
behavior: Avoids talking about the brother or the upcoming birthday.
